claim_boundary: diagnostic evidence about one-third tower geometry and ABC runtime behavior

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: BBB can describe one-third quotient geometry for the run budget.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: BBB cannot yet interpret one-third quotient geometry.
goal_criteria.partial_signal: tower_shape_summary.csv exists for only part of the locked budget
goal_criteria.question: What tower geometry does source-local one-third contraction produce?
goal_criteria.success_signal: tower_shape_summary.csv has rows for small and medium tiers

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: BBB can inspect upstream ABC tier selection behavior.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: BBB lacks the controller evidence needed for this diagnostic.
goal_criteria.partial_signal: ABC rows are present but missing for some controller events
goal_criteria.question: How does upstream ABC choose active tiers under this schema?

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: BBB can separate quotient geometry from lift/execution behavior.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: BBB cannot distinguish geometry from lift failure.
goal_criteria.failure_signal: lift and concrete step evidence is missing
goal_criteria.partial_signal: some lift data exists but structural-limit classifications are triggered
goal_criteria.question: Do selected abstract actions lift to concrete counterpoint steps?

structural_limit_checks.claim_effect: blocks ordinary performance interpretation; diagnostic remains valid
structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: The first projection has collapsed all base states into one state cell.

structural_limit_checks.claim_effect: marks quotient geometry as structurally limiting
structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: One tier-1 cell contains at least 90 percent of base states.
The controller is targeting a tier that cannot emit concrete actions.
structural_limit_checks.trigger: ABC selected tier is recorded as non-executable

structural_limit_checks.claim_effect: blocks learning-performance interpretation for affected runs
structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: The runtime could not find an executable tier/action at that point.
The controller loop ran without producing concrete environment steps.
The run is missing the ABC evidence needed for tier-selection interpretation.
structural_limit_checks.trigger: controller events exist without ABC diagnostic rows
